chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 310 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of main case 23-05-2023 Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press instant petition on the ground that the same has become infructuous. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
